requirement_topic.en: ELECTRA Grid Interface — 230/400 V 50 Hz Island Network
requirement_topic.zh: ELECTRA电网接口——230/400 V 50 Hz岛屿电网
requirement_topic.zht: ELECTRA電網接口——230/400 V 50 Hz島嶼電網

summary.en: Cape Verde operates a 230/400 V, 50 Hz electricity system in the IEC/European legacy family, with electricity-sector oversight by ARME and utility operation by ELECTRA. EV charger projects should be engineered for local distribution capacity, island-grid constraints, voltage tolerance, earthing, metering, power quality, harmonic injection, and renewable-rich grid conditions. The nominal frequency matches China at 50 Hz, but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V domestic baseline.
summary.zh: 佛得角采用IEC/欧洲传统体系的230/400 V、50 Hz电力系统，电力部门由ARME监管，公用事业由ELECTRA运营。电动汽车充电桩项目应针对本地配电容量、岛屿电网约束、电压容差、接地、计量、电能质量、谐波注入以及高可再生能源渗透条件进行工程设计。标称频率与中国同为50 Hz，但电压不同于中国国内220/380 V基线。
summary.zht: 維德角採用IEC/歐洲傳統體系的230/400 V、50 Hz電力系統，電力部門由ARME監管，公用事業由ELECTRA運營。電動汽車充電樁項目應針對本地配電容量、島嶼電網約束、電壓容差、接地、計量、電能質量、諧波注入以及高可再生能源滲透條件進行工程設計。標稱頻率與中國同為50 Hz，但電壓不同於中國國內220/380 V基線。

standards_or_laws: ARME electricity-sector regulation and grid-connection oversight
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC/European 230/400 V 50 Hz low-voltage supply practice

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. China nominal supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. The same 50 Hz frequency does not eliminate the need to confirm 230/400 V input ratings, protection settings, transformer or rectifier ratings, and thermal derating for Cape Verde's islands.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信以及当地电网运营商验收。中国标称供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。即使频率同为50 Hz，仍需确认230/400 V输入额定值、保护设定、变压器或整流器额定值，以及适用于佛得角岛屿环境的热降额。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊以及當地電網運營商驗收。中國標稱供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。即使頻率同為50 Hz，仍需確認230/400 V輸入額定值、保護設定、變壓器或整流器額定值，以及適用於維德角島嶼環境的熱降額。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input-voltage range, protective-device coordination, harmonic data, power-factor behavior, earthing system assumptions, metering, load-management logic, and site-specific ELECTRA connection conditions for each island. A China-only 220/380 V nameplate or test package is not enough for Cape Verde's 230/400 V grid even though both systems are 50 Hz.
gap.zh: 出口商须针对各岛项目确认输入电压范围、保护器件配合、谐波数据、功率因数表现、接地系统假设、计量、负载管理逻辑以及具体ELECTRA接入条件。即使两地同为50 Hz，仅有中国220/380 V铭牌或测试资料包也不足以覆盖佛得角230/400 V电网。
gap.zht: 出口商須針對各島項目確認輸入電壓範圍、保護器件配合、諧波數據、功率因數表現、接地系統假設、計量、負載管理邏輯以及具體ELECTRA接入條件。即使兩地同為50 Hz，僅有中國220/380 V銘牌或測試資料包也不足以覆蓋維德角230/400 V電網。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but required for grid-connected installations; ARME-regulated electricity service and ELECTRA connection conditions must be confirmed before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ELECTRA or ARME approval substitute; voltage ratings differ

source.publisher: ARME — Agência Reguladora Multissetorial da Economia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cape Verde is a 230/400 V 50 Hz market, not a direct 220/380 V China clone. Confirm grid ratings, power quality, protection settings, and ELECTRA project conditions before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 佛得角是230/400 V 50 Hz市场，并非可直接套用中国220/380 V设计。出货或安装前应确认电网额定值、电能质量、保护设定和ELECTRA项目条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 維德角是230/400 V 50 Hz市場，並非可直接套用中國220/380 V設計。出貨或安裝前應確認電網額定值、電能質量、保護設定和ELECTRA項目條件。
